visuals.title: Dc Strategy
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Divide and Conquer Strategy</text>

  <!-- Main Problem -->
  <rect x="160" y="60" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Main Problem
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Divide Arrow -->
  <path d="M210 105 L210 125" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="210" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Divide
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Subproblems -->
  <rect x="100" y="130" width="80" height="35" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="240" y="130" width="80" height="35" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="140" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Subproblem 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="280" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Subproblem 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Solve Arrows -->
  <path d="M140 170 L140 190" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <path d="M280 170 L280 190" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="140" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Solve
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="280" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Solve
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Solutions -->
  <rect x="100" y="195" width="80" height="35" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="240" y="195" width="80" height="35" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="140" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Solution 1
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="280" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Solution 2
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Combine Arrow -->
  <path d="M140 235 L140 255 L280 255 L280 235" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <text x="210" y="250" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Combine
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Final Solution -->
  <rect x="160" y="260" width="100" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="285" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Final Solution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
